mapper.insert:
SELECT MAX(BIZ_NO) FROM TB_BUSINESS WHERE BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
INSERT INTO TB_BUSINESS ( BIZ_ID, BIZ_TYPE, BIZ_REG_NO, BIZ_NAME, CEO_NAME, PHONE, STATUS_CD, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{bizId}, #{bizType}, #{bizRegNo}, #{bizName}, #{ceoName}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO TB_BUSINESS_AUTH ( BIZ_NO, BIZ_REG_NO, BIZ_TYPE, STATUS_CD, APPLY_DATE ) VALUES ( #{bizNo}, #{bizRegNo}, #{bizType}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT B.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, B.BIZ_NAME AS bizName, B.BIZ_TYPE AS bizType, B.BIZ_REG_NO AS bizRegNo, B.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, A.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason FROM TB_BUSINESS B JOIN TB_BUSINESS_AUTH A ON A.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY A.APPLY_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT BIZ_NO AS bizNo, BIZ_ID AS bizId, BIZ_TYPE AS bizType, BIZ_REG_NO AS bizRegNo, BIZ_NAME AS bizName, CEO_NAME AS ceoName, PHONE AS phone, STATUS_CD AS statusCd FROM TB_BUSINESS WHERE BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BUSINESS SET BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType}, BIZ_REG_NO = #{bizRegNo}, BIZ_NAME = #{bizName}, CEO_NAME = #{ceoName}, PHONE = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS_CD = 'PENDING' WHERE BIZ_NO = #{bizNo} AND BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND STATUS_CD = 'REJECTED'
